title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at mfine Global Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at mfine Global Group
jsonLd.description:
mfine Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About mfine Global Group:
mfine Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with mfine Global Group!
